text_block_list.text:
Autumn's first race arrives, and Mejiro McQueen comfortably places 
first in the Kyoto Daishoten.

With each new race she runs, she earns still greater respect and 
admiration.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I'm shook! You can't take two steps without seeing McQueen's face on 
some magazine or screen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I never expected to draw quite this much attention…

text_block_list.name: Young Boy
text_block_list.text: Wow, it's Major McKeen! Can you shake my hand?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Yes, I'd be happy to. Also, it's "Mejiro McQueen."

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Even the whippersnappers know 'er. Ey, Star Horsegirl?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Really… Can't you stop with the jokes for even a second?

text_block_list.name: Young Boy
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna cheer real loud for you in the next race too. Do your best, 
Major McKeen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much. I definitely have to win now! Also, it's "Mejiro 
McQueen."

text_block_list.name: Young Boy
text_block_list.text: See you! Bye-bye!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Goodbye now!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I can't say that I am used to these kinds of interactions. Reputation is 
a strange thing.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: What's that? Don't tell me you're going to turn into a jittery mess.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Th-That is definitely not going to happen. As a member of the 
prestigious Mejiro family, I always carry myself with dignity!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oh yeah? Well, I don't see why you can't just jitter out sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Would you please make up your mind?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Good morning, everyone.

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl with Straight-cut Bangs
text_block_list.text:
McQueen, good news! It looks like there are a ton more people 
asking to transfer into our team!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: My, the applications haven't stopped since the Kyoto Daishoten.

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl with Black Bob-cut
text_block_list.text: It's all thanks to your efforts, McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl with Straight-cut Bangs
text_block_list.text:
It would be super amazing if you could also win the autumn Tenno 
Sho. Imagine winning both spring and fall!

text_block_list.name: Droopy-eyed Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: The number of new applicants would be through the roof!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Please, you're all speaking like I've already won.

It's no wonder everyone's so excited. You're showing no signs of 
slowing down!

It's no wonder everyone's so excited. You're showing no signs of 
slowing down!

It's been a while since Team Sirius has had this much attention. 
Probably not since the heyday of the last trainer.

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl with Straight-cut Bangs
text_block_list.text: Oh, we are so back.

text_block_list.name: Droopy-eyed Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: You've got my front-row cheers!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Thank you for your enthusiastic support, everyone. I will be winning the next race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: With that being said, let's start today's training.

True to her bold words, McQueen brings an inspiring amount of 
energy to the day's training session.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Whoa, look at 'er go!

And that's a finish! A flawless win, and you took the initiative at the 
best possible moment!

And that's a finish! A flawless win, and you took the initiative at the 
best possible moment!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant…

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Well, of course. At the Takarazuka Kinen, I failed to seize a good 
position and had to take wide arcs around the turns.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
If I want to ensure that races go my way, I need to pay extra attention 
to my dash power and positioning.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ho ho ho. Mayhaps you will soon be able to face me, young one.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Before you worry about racing me, perhaps you should try passing the 
basic gate test.

All right folks, let's wrap it up here for today. Be sure to ice those 
legs.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Actually, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I'm still feeling pretty good, so I'll be taking another lap.

text_block_list.name: Droopy-eyed Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Oh, then I'm going to go for another one, too.

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl with Black Bob-cut
text_block_list.text: Me too! If McQueen can still do it, so can we!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hm? Please don't force yourselves…

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl with Straight-cut Bangs
text_block_list.text: Nah, it's fine! Seeing you run gives us the power!
choice_data_list: All right, just a bit more.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Goodness. Once more, then.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Golly, they make it look easy. Guess I'll spice things up!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hey! Hands off the tail!

Mejiro McQueen's industrious attitude has had nothing but good 
effects on the team.
She very much is the heart and soul of Team Sirius.

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text: Trainer!
Tazuna! You need me?

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text: There's something I'd like to discuss with you concerning McQueen.
